message:
feat(term): add diagram diff and minimap modules

Adds visual diff comparison and minimap navigation for terminal rendering.

diff.rs:
- DiffStatus enum: Added, Removed, Changed, Unchanged
- DiffNode, DiffEdge, DiffCluster structs with status tracking
- DiagramDiff result type with node/edge/cluster diff sets
- diff_diagrams() function comparing two MermaidDiagramIr instances
- Visual highlighting hints for terminal rendering of diffs

minimap.rs:
- Minimap struct for viewport navigation in large diagrams
- Compact proportional representation of full diagram
- Viewport indicator showing visible region
- Braille/block character rendering for density display

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
